content.p: Sections 396a, 396b, 396c, and 396d of this title shall not apply to the Crow Reservation in Montana, the ceded lands of the Shoshone Reservation in Wyoming, the Osage Reservation in Oklahoma, nor to the coal and asphalt lands of the Choctaw and Chickasaw Tribes in Oklahoma.

note.heading: Amendments
note.p: 1955—Act May 27, 1955, struck out “the Papago Indian Reservation in Arizona,” after “shall not apply to”.

note.heading: Repeal of Inconsistent Acts
note.p: For repeal of inconsistent acts, see section 7 of act May 11, 1938, set out as a note under section 396a of this title.

note.heading: Papago Indian Reservation
note.p: Section 1 of act May 27, 1955, authorized the leasing of minerals for mining purposes. See note under section 5103 of this title.
